result.stdout:
Usage: evdb [--action <Enum>] [--database <String>] [--name <String>] [--connection-string <String>] [--environment <String>] [--prefix <String>] [--schema <String>] [--outbox <EvDbShardName>...] [--features <Enum>...] [--dry-run] [--help] [--version] path

EvDb.Cli

Arguments:
  0: path    Path for a script file won't affect the DB when exists)

Options:
  -a, --action <Enum>                 Action (`CreateParser`, `Drop`) (Required) (Allowed values: Create, Drop)
  -d, --database <String>             Database type (`sql-server` | `postgres`, etc.) (Required)
  -n, --name <String>                 Database/Collection name (Required)
  -c, --connection-string <String>    Connection string
  -e, --environment <String>          Environment (Development, Production, QA, etc.)
  -p, --prefix <String>               Table prefix
  -s, --schema <String>               Schema of the tables
  -o, --outbox <EvDbShardName>...     outbox tables names (ALLOW MULTIPLE)
  -f, --features <Enum>...            Storage features like: `stream`, `snapshot`, `outbox`, `all`
  --dry-run                           Only writes to the console
  -h, --help                          Show help message
  --version                           Show version
